scenarios.description: Custom TreeBuilder stub with mixed-case duplicate tags; preserveCase=false yields lowercase unique tag names
pseudocode: TEST TC05 tagSet lowercases and deduplicates
@Override public ParseSettings defaultSettings(){ return new ParseSettings(false,false); }
@Override public Document parse(Reader in,String baseUri,Parser parser){return null;}
@Override public List<Node> parseFragment(Reader in,@Nullable Element context,String baseUri,Parser parser){return List.of();}
@Override public void initialiseParse(Reader reader,String baseUri,Parser parser){}
